title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese recommends building four Claude Code projects to increase productivity: an AI Board of Advisors, a niched command center, an AI-optimized website, and an internal operating system. The video advocates learning through building rather than watching tutorials.
